name: CHKRZV
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[CHKRZV] ON [dbo].[REZERVEDETAY]
FOR INSERT, UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @SD_REF		 INT
DECLARE @STOK_REF	 INT
DECLARE @VARYANT_REF INT
DECLARE @SIP_TOPREZ	 FLOAT
DECLARE @STK_TOPREZ  FLOAT
DECLARE @GCI INT
DECLARE @ABMIK  FLOAT

DECLARE @SIPRZVKUL AS INT
SELECT @SIPRZVKUL=SIPRZVKUL FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK)
IF ISNULL(@SIPRZVKUL,0)>0 
BEGIN

SET @SIP_TOPREZ=0
SET @STK_TOPREZ=0

SELECT @GCI=GCI,@ABMIK=ABMIKTAR FROM INSERTED R

IF @GCI=0 BEGIN
	SELECT @SIP_TOPREZ= ((SH.CARPAN2/SH.CARPAN1)*(SH.MIKTAR-SH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR))- ISNULL((SELECT ABMIKTAR FROM REZERVESD RD WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE RD.SD_REF=R.SD_REF),0),
		   @STK_TOPREZ= CONVERT(FLOAT,CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),
							ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AMBARTAKIP WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_REF=R.STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=R.VARYANT_REF AND AMBAR_KODU=R.AMBAR_KODU),0)
							))-
						CONVERT(FLOAT,CONVERT(NUMERIC(24,8),
							ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ABMIKTAR) FROM REZERVEDETAY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STOK_REF=SH.STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=SH.VARYANT_REF AND AMBAR_KODU=SH.AMBAR_KODU),0)
							))
	FROM INSERTED R
	LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK) ON SH.SD_REF=R.SD_REF 

	IF @SIP_TOPREZ<0 BEGIN
		rollback transaction RAISERROR ('ERR-RZV-001' , 16, 1)
	END
	ELSE
	IF @STK_TOPREZ<0 BEGIN
		rollback transaction RAISERROR ('ERR-RZV-002' , 16, 1)  
	END
END
IF @GCI=2 BEGIN
	SET @ABMIK=ISNULL((SELECT ABMIKTAR FROM REZERVESD RD WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE RD.SD_REF=@SD_REF),0)-@ABMIK
	IF @ABMIK<0 BEGIN
		rollback transaction RAISERROR ('ERR-RZV-003' , 16, 1)
	END
END
END
